math.name: vec3Add
math.description: Returns the component-wise sum of two vectors.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Add(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): Vector3

math.name: vec3Sub
math.description: Returns the component-wise difference of two vectors.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Sub(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): Vector3

math.name: vec3Scale
math.description: Scales a vector by a scalar.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Scale(v: Vector3, s: number): Vector3

math.name: vec3Dot
math.description: Computes the dot product of two vectors.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Dot(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number

math.name: vec3Cross
math.description: Computes the cross product of two vectors.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Cross(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): Vector3

math.name: vec3Length
math.description: Returns the Euclidean length of a vector.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Length(v: Vector3): number

math.name: vec3Normalize
math.description: Returns the unit-length direction of a vector, or the zero vector if length is 0.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Normalize(v: Vector3): Vector3

math.name: vec3Lerp
math.description: Linearly interpolates between two vectors by factor `t`.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Lerp(a: Vector3, b: Vector3, t: number): Vector3

math.name: vec3Negate
math.description: Negates all components of a vector.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Negate(v: Vector3): Vector3

math.name: vec3Distance
math.description: Returns the Euclidean distance between two points.
math.typeSignature: function vec3Distance(a: Vector3, b: Vector3): number

math.name: typeIsVector3
math.description: Type guard that checks whether a value is a `Vector3` tuple.
math.typeSignature: function typeIsVector3(value: unknown): value is Vector3

math.name: Vector3
math.description: A 3-component vector represented as a labeled tuple [x, y, z].
math.typeSignature: type Vector3 = [x: number, y: number, z: number];

math.name: mat4Create
math.description: Creates a zeroed 4×4 matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4Create(): Matrix4

math.name: mat4Identity
math.description: Creates a 4×4 identity matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4Identity(): Matrix4

math.name: mat4Clone
math.description: Returns a copy of the given matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4Clone(m: Matrix4): Matrix4

math.name: mat4Multiply
math.description: Multiplies two 4×4 matrices.
math.typeSignature: function mat4Multiply(a: Matrix4, b: Matrix4): Matrix4

math.name: mat4Translate
math.description: Applies a translation to a matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4Translate(m: Matrix4, v: Vector3): Matrix4

math.name: mat4Scale
math.description: Applies a scale transform to a matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4Scale(m: Matrix4, v: Vector3): Matrix4

math.name: mat4RotateX
math.description: Applies a rotation around the X axis to a matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4RotateX(m: Matrix4, angle: number): Matrix4

math.name: mat4RotateY
math.description: Applies a rotation around the Y axis to a matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4RotateY(m: Matrix4, angle: number): Matrix4

math.name: mat4RotateZ
math.description: Applies a rotation around the Z axis to a matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4RotateZ(m: Matrix4, angle: number): Matrix4

math.name: mat4LookAt
math.description: Constructs a view matrix looking from `eye` toward `target` with the given `up` direction.
math.typeSignature: function mat4LookAt(eye: Vector3, target: Vector3, up: Vector3): Matrix4

math.name: mat4Perspective
math.description: Constructs a perspective projection matrix.
math.typeSignature: function mat4Perspective(fovRadians: number, aspect: number, near: number, far: number): Matrix4

math.name: mat4Orthographic
math.description: Constructs an orthographic projection matrix.
math.typeSignature:
function mat4Orthographic(
    left: number,
    right: number,
    bottom: number,
    top: number,
    near: number,
    far: number
): Matrix4

math.name: mat4TransformPoint
math.description: Transforms a 3D point by a 4×4 matrix, performing the perspective divide.
math.typeSignature: function mat4TransformPoint(m: Matrix4, v: Vector3): Vector3

math.name: Matrix4
math.description: A column-major 4×4 matrix stored as a 16-element `Float64Array`.
math.typeSignature: type Matrix4 = Float64Array;

math.name: projectPoint
math.description: Projects a 3D world-space point onto 2D screen-space via a view-projection matrix and viewport.
math.typeSignature: function projectPoint(point: Vector3, viewProjection: Matrix4, viewport: Viewport): ProjectedPoint

math.name: ProjectedPoint
math.description: A 2D screen-space point with a depth component for z-ordering.
math.typeSignature: type ProjectedPoint = [x: number, y: number, depth: number];

math.name: Viewport
math.description: Viewport dimensions used for projection.

context.name: createContext
context.description: Creates a 3D rendering context attached to the given DOM target.
context.typeSignature: function createContext(target: string | HTMLElement, options?: Context3DOptions): Context3D

context.name: Context3DOptions
context.description: Options for the 3D rendering context, extending the base context options with camera parameters.

context.name: Context3D
context.description: 3D rendering context extending the Canvas context with view/projection matrices and a face buffer for painter's algorithm sorting.

members.name: setCamera
members.description: Sets the view matrix from an eye position, look-at target, and up direction.

members.name: setPerspective
members.description: Updates the perspective projection with the given field of view, near, and far planes.

members.name: setOrthographic
members.description: Sets an orthographic projection with explicit frustum bounds.

members.name: project
members.description: Projects a 3D world-space point to 2D screen coordinates.

members.name: markRenderStart
members.description: Signals the start of a render pass; resets the rendered-elements list at depth 0.

members.name: markRenderEnd
members.description: Signals the end of a render pass.

members.name: save
members.description: Pushes the current state onto the stack and resets to defaults.

members.name: restore
members.description: Restores the most recently saved state from the stack.

members.name: clear
members.description: Clears the entire rendering surface.

members.name: reset
members.description: Resets the context to its initial state.

members.name: rotate
members.description: Applies a rotation transformation.

members.name: scale
members.description: Applies a scale transformation.

members.name: translate
members.description: Applies a translation transformation.

members.name: measureText
members.description: Measures text dimensions using the context's current font or an optional override.

members.name: createPath
members.description: Creates a new path element, optionally reusing an id for SVG diffing efficiency.

members.name: applyClip
members.description: Clips subsequent drawing operations to the given path.

members.name: drawImage
members.description: Draws an image onto the rendering surface at the given position and optional size.

members.name: applyFill
members.description: Fills the given path or text element using the current fill style.

members.name: applyStroke
members.description: Strokes the given path or text element using the current stroke style.

members.name: isPointInPath
members.description: Tests whether a point is inside the filled region of a path.

members.name: isPointInStroke
members.description: Tests whether a point is on the stroked outline of a path.

members.name: getDefaultState
members.type: { fill: string; filter: string; direction: Direction; font: string; fontKerning: FontKerning; opacity: number; globalCompositeOperation: unknown; lineCap: LineCap; lineDash: number[]; lineDashOffset: number; lineJoin: LineJoin; lineWidth: number; miterLimit: number; shadowBlur: number; shadowColor: string; shadowOffsetX: number; shadowOffsetY: number; stroke: string; textAlign: TextAlignment; textBaseline: TextBaseline; zIndex: number; translateX: number; translateY: number; transformScaleX: number; transformScaleY: number; rotation: Rotation; transformOriginX: TransformOrigin; transformOriginY: TransformOrigin; }

members.name: batch
members.description: Executes a callback within a save/restore pair, returning the callback's result.

members.name: invalidateTrackedElements
members.description: Clears the cached list of tracked elements for interaction, forcing a rebuild on the next hit test.

members.name: createText
members.description: Creates a new text element from the given options.

members.name: enableInteraction
members.description: Enables DOM interaction events (mouse enter, leave, move, click) with element hit testing.

members.name: disableInteraction
members.description: Disables DOM interaction events and clears the active element set.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Destroys the context, removing the DOM element and disposing all resources.

members.name: has
members.description: Returns whether there are any listeners registered for the given event type.

members.name: on
members.description: Subscribes a handler to the given event type and returns a disposable for cleanup.

members.name: off
members.description: Removes a previously registered handler for the given event type.

members.name: once
members.description: Subscribes a handler that is automatically removed after it fires once.

members.name: emit
members.description: Emits an event, invoking all matching handlers and bubbling to the parent if applicable.

members.name: retain
members.description: Registers a disposable resource under an optional key for later cleanup.

members.name: dispose
members.description: Disposes all resources under the given key, or all resources if no key is provided.

camera.name: createCamera
camera.description: Factory function that creates a new `Camera` bound to a 3D scene.
camera.typeSignature: function createCamera(scene: Scene<Context3D>, options?: CameraOptions): Camera

camera.name: CameraInteractionOption
camera.description: A camera interaction can be enabled/disabled with a boolean or configured with sensitivity.

camera.name: CameraInteractionConfig
camera.description: Fine-grained configuration for a single camera interaction.

camera.name: CameraInteractions
camera.description: Configures which camera interactions (zoom, pivot, pan) are enabled.

camera.name: CameraOptions
camera.description: Options for constructing a camera, including position, projection type, and interaction config.

camera.name: Camera
camera.description: An interactive camera controlling the 3D context's view and projection, with mouse/touch orbit, pan, and zoom.

members.name: flush
members.description: Flushes pending camera changes to the 3D context's view and projection matrices.

members.name: dispose
members.description: Disposes all resources under the given key, or all resources if no key is provided.

members.name: retain
members.description: Registers a disposable resource under an optional key for later cleanup.

core.name: createShape3D
core.description: Factory function that creates a new `Shape3D` instance.

core.name: elementIsShape3D
core.description: Type guard that checks whether a value is a `Shape3D` instance.
core.typeSignature: function elementIsShape3D(value: unknown): value is Shape3D

core.name: Face3D
core.description: A single face of a 3D mesh, defined by its vertices and an optional precomputed normal.

core.name: ProjectedFace3D
core.description: A projected face ready for 2D rendering with screen-space points, fill/stroke styles, and depth.

core.name: Shape3DState
core.description: State interface for a 3D shape, defining position and rotation around each axis.

core.name: Shape3DOptions
core.description: Options for constructing a 3D shape, with all state properties optional.
core.typeSignature: type Shape3DOptions<TState extends Shape3DState = Shape3DState> = Partial<ElementOptions<TState>>;

core.name: Shape3D
core.description: Base class for 3D shapes, handling model transforms, face projection, shading, and hit testing.
core.typeSignature: class Shape3D<TState extends Shape3DState = Shape3DState> extends Shape<TState>

members.name: setStateValue
members.description: Sets a state value and emits an `updated` event.

members.name: getDepth
members.description: Returns the projected depth of this shape's origin in the given 3D context.

members.name: getBoundingBox
members.description: Returns the axis-aligned bounding box for this element. Override in subclasses for accurate geometry.

members.name: render
members.description: Renders this element by applying transforms and context state, then invoking the optional callback.

members.name: intersectsWith
members.description: Tests whether a point intersects this element’s bounding box. Override for custom hit testing.

members.name: getStateValue
members.description: Reads a state value, falling back to the parent’s value if the local value is nil (property inheritance).

members.name: on
members.description: Subscribes a handler to the given event type and returns a disposable for cleanup.

members.name: clone
members.description: Creates a shallow clone of this element with the same id, classes, and state.

members.name: interpolate
members.description: Creates an interpolator that transitions from the current state towards the target state, supporting keyframes and custom interpolator overrides.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Emits a `destroyed` event, clears all listeners, and disposes retained resources.

members.name: has
members.description: Returns whether there are any listeners registered for the given event type.

members.name: off
members.description: Removes a previously registered handler for the given event type.

members.name: once
members.description: Subscribes a handler that is automatically removed after it fires once.

members.name: emit
members.description: Emits an event, invoking all matching handlers and bubbling to the parent if applicable.

members.name: retain
members.description: Registers a disposable resource under an optional key for later cleanup.

members.name: dispose
members.description: Disposes all resources under the given key, or all resources if no key is provided.

shading.name: computeFaceNormal
shading.description: Computes the surface normal of a face from its first three vertices via the cross product.

shading.name: computeFaceBrightness
shading.description: Computes a 0–1 brightness value for a face given its normal and a light direction.
shading.typeSignature: function computeFaceBrightness(normal: Vector3, lightDirection: Vector3, normalized?: boolean): number

shading.name: shadeFaceColor
shading.description: Shades a color by a brightness factor (0–1), darkening or lightening the RGB channels.
shading.typeSignature: function shadeFaceColor(baseColor: string, brightness: number): string;

interpolators.name: interpolateVector3
interpolators.description: Interpolator factory for `Vector3` values, using component-wise linear interpolation.
